prompt: Create an ultra-realistic luxury fashion editorial portrait of a beautiful East Asian woman seated in a relaxed but powerful pose, photographed from mid-thigh upward in a vertical 4:5 crop. She has long, silky, slightly wind-tousled black hair and wears oversized sunburst gold statement earrings. Her outfit is an elegant monochrome ivory cream tailored suit: structured blazer with sharp lapels, matching low-cut buttoned waistcoat, high-waisted pleated trousers, belt, and refined buttons on the cuff. Pose her leaning against geometric studio blocks, one knee raised on the left, her right arm resting casually on a peach rectangular block, left hand relaxed over her lap, projecting calm confidence. Use a warm peach and lavender geometric backdrop with exactly three main background forms: a peach wall with a dramatic diagonal beam of sunlight, a vertical lavender panel on the right, and a purple block in the lower right foreground. Lighting should be golden-hour warm sunlight with cinematic shadows, crisp diagonal shadow shapes, glossy high-fashion skin highlights, and a Vogue-inspired editorial mood. Camera style: professional full-frame fashion photography, shallow depth of field, natural skin texture, premium fabric detail, rich warm tones, no text, no logo, no watermark. Leave the face naturally visible unless privacy masking is desired; if masked, use a simple soft-edged square blur matching the skin tone over the face.
